brand.name: CareerFlow
brand.description: Capture achievements continuously, generate resumes instantly

hero.title: Your Achievements, Always Ready
hero.subtitle: Stop stressing over resumes. Upload your resume or connect Notion—AI extracts your career highlights and generates tailored resumes whenever opportunity knocks.
hero.upload_hint: Supported formats: PDF or DOCX, max 10MB
hero.drop_subtitle: or click to browse through your local files

achievement_bank.title: Achievement Bank
achievement_bank.desc: AI extracts career highlights from resumes and Notion, organized by impact tier, always ready to deploy

one_click_resume.title: Tailored in Seconds
one_click_resume.desc: Paste a job description, AI matches your strongest achievements and assembles a custom resume

always_ready.title: Always Prepared
always_ready.desc: When the right opportunity appears, your career story is already polished and ready

jd_panel.title: Job Description (Optional)
jd_panel.placeholder:
Paste job description here, AI will match your most relevant achievements...

Or skip this and drag achievements directly from your library

achievement_panel.empty_state: No achievements yet. Upload a resume or connect Notion to get started

library.title: Achievement Library
library.subtitle: Your career highlights, organized and ready
library.empty_state: No achievements yet. Head to the workspace to upload your resume

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Unlock unlimited exports and always be ready for your next opportunity

version_history.title: Version History
version_history.restore_confirm: Restore this version? Your current content will be replaced.

paywall.title: Ready to Export
paywall.subtitle: Upgrade to Pro to download your resume
